name: Citrus Salsa 11[vegan]
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel the zest from the orange and lemon, leaving the white pith intact on the fruit.
2. Slice half of the zest into very thin strips (about 1/16 inch thick).
3. Discard the remaining zest or save it for another use.
4. Cut the peeled orange and lemon, including the pith, into quarters.
5. Place the fruit in a food processor or blender and coarsely chop.
6. Pour the fruit into a small saucepan and stir in rosemary, juice, and Sucanat (or substitute).
7. Cook over medium heat for 2 - 3 minutes. Remove from heat, stir in zest, and let cool.
8. Spoon the salsa into a sterilized jar and refrigerate. The salsa will keep for 7 - 10 days.
